calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status.
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Continued To May-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Richard Schindler appearing for executor Jacquelyn Vallier. Counsel received a receipt from the Alameda Public Administrator. They have accepted the check. Matter is continued to 5/2 for further status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Schindler (Counsel for Jacquelyn Vallier, personal representative).

After presentation by Mr. Schindler concerning surcharging the personal representative, fees, and the viability of final distribution in the face of a missing/deceased heir, the Court set the matter for status on February 7, 2007 and took the matter under submission. Subsequent to the hearing and the calendar call, the Court granted the petition, signing the Order for same after hearing (whereupon the Order was retrieved by Mr. Schindler for filing).

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
